pullRequest.title: [DOM-53643] DatasetRw: Change CLI Upload Subdirectory Test Size API Call

nodes.body: It should be `data_subdir/data_subdir` since I am uploading the same directory with the same file twice. I agree it is slightly confusing but I chose try to make it simpler with the same name name instead of renaming the folder before the second upload. But, I appreciate the attention to detail!
Also, for uploading things to a dataset via the CLI, it doesn't upload the containing folder and `{data_dir}` actually isn't uploaded.
